items.speaker: narrator
items.text: The empire splits, reunites, splits again. Four hundred years of Han, and now the luck has run out.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: A failed scholar found three ancient scrolls in the mountains. He healed the sick, asked nothing, and followers poured in across eight provinces.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: The Blue Heaven is dead — the Yellow Heaven rises. Half a million people wrapped yellow cloth around their heads, and government troops fled.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Governor Liu Yan posted a recruitment notice in Youzhou. Within days, every city gate carried the same paper.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: No one knew yet who it would bring.
